note: frozen eval = exp_perf.yaml (v2 config, total_steps=600, ~19.7M tok, ~4.2min/run on RTX PRO 6000). baseline twins perf_base1/2 launched; wave1 (ns6, ns8, normuon) queued behind them. base1: loss600=5.0617 vals=[5.9076,5.3107,5.0617] tps=155308 wall=252s

finding: NS convergence vs exact polar: Gaussian rect r>=2 converged at 6 it (err 0.001 = fp16 floor). Power-law p=1 spectra (smin/smax 2e-3, momentum-like): ns6 err 0.114, ns8 err 0.005 = dsv4_10. VERDICT: ns8 is free 2-iter compression; ns6 is a fidelity trade; 6-step faithful orthogonalization impossible at cap 1.125 (minimax solver stalls at KJ-clone fixed point [0.45,1.11], mmx6 DROPPED without a run).

verdict: REFUTED at L0, no VM run: sinkhorn equalizes row/col norms not singular values; power-law spectra (p=1,1.5) pass through with smin/smax UNCHANGED (2.0e-3->2.1e-3) and ns6 output kappa slightly WORSE (1.4->1.6, 22.9->26.3). Third and final refutation of the sinkhorn-precond family.

verdicts: normuon -0.016 (~8 sigma) SCREEN WIN, confirm at 2000; ns8 loss-tie +1.9% tps Pareto candidate, confirm; ns6 +4.4% tps but -3 sigma loss, hold for wall-clock judgment after confirms
caveat: normuon leads from FIRST eval (5.8858 vs 5.9076) - could be effective-LR-early artifact; 2000-step confirm with full whd schedule decides

finding: JOINT 6-step solve FEASIBLE at l0=2e-3: KJ-seeded start converges to composite band [0.71,0.84] (cap 1.6); free last-step rescale by (1+delta)/max lifts to ~[0.96,1.12] = 12% worst-case dev at 18 GEMMs vs ns6's 27%. Random inits NaN (stiff, unclipped Adam) - only KJ-seeded start survives, fine. jns6 arm = solver output + analytic last-step rescale, pending final JSON at wave-2 pickup.

note: user directive: LM screening closed entirely. Killed wave-2 mid-run. Salvage: gram600 5.0693 @155.7k tps = NO tps win at 137M-class shapes (gram advantage measured on 2048x8192, washes on batched 512x512) + slightly worse loss -> gram REJECTED at this scale. normuon LM confirm partial: 4.2479@1200 vs default 4.2742@1200 = -0.026, screen win was REAL and GROWING (-0.016@600 -> -0.026@1200). Strong prior for the reserved 100-120M LM budget.

user: not literal grokking - high-contrast accuracy-at-budget benchmark (percentage points, not 0.1% loss noise) + scaling ablations (dataset scale = frac axis, model scale = d axis, config axis) around a calibrated baseline. Harness fixed (torch.stack int bug), calibration wave RUNNING: frac {0.3,0.4,0.5} + seed twin + adamw control, 6000 steps, 5 parallel procs, ~10 min. Early: memorization instant (train loss 0.01@800), heldout creeps with frac (f50 18%@800), adamw control far behind (2%@1000) = optimizer contrast visible early.

findings: mid-transition acc is NOISY (twin spread 3.7 pts at f40); f50 saturates by 3200; ADAMW (wd 1.0) BEATS muon-default (hidden wd 0.1) at f40 70.9 vs 46.7 - grokking speed is wd-driven, arms were wd-confounded. Operating point: frac 0.45, rank by curve (acc@2k/4k/6k + grok_step), 3 seeds. wd probe added (muon wd 0.3/1.0).
decision: grid-1 launched: 7 arms (default,ns6,ns8,jns6,normuon,k2,adamw) x 3 seeds + 2 wd probes = 23 parallel jobs @ frac 0.45

schedule: KJ-like x4 + PIN-like x2 with last step rescaled x1.341 (joint solve cap 1.6, floor 0.7135 -> band [0.96,1.12] from l0=2e-3)
note: joint solver converged to near-ns6 + final upscale; modest improvement; testing as jns6 arm in grid-1

verdicts: 1) WD DOMINATES: muon wd 0.1->0.3->1.0 grok ~5500->3800->1600, dwarfs coeff axis. 2) wd-matched muon BEATS adamw ~2x (1600 vs 2600-3800). 3) normuon HURTS grokking (2/3 seeds never grok) - SIGN FLIP vs LM where it led. 4) coeff variants (ns6/ns8/jns6/k2) all inside seed noise at wd 0.1.
dispatch: grid-2: all 6 muon arms x 3 seeds at wd 1.0 + default wd 0.6/2.0 probes (20 jobs, launched ~06:58)

verdicts: 1) COEFF AXIS DEAD at matched wd: default=ns6=ns8=jns6=k2 EXACTLY per-seed (1400/1600/1600) -> ns6 18 GEMMs == k2 60 GEMMs for grokking; NS fidelity beyond 6 iters buys nothing here. 2) normuon consistently worse (confirmed harmful for grokking). 3) wd dose-response continues: 2.0 -> grok@1000; frontier not yet found.
dispatch: grid-3 scaling ablation: {default,ns6} x d{128,256,512} x frac{0.35,0.55} x 2 seeds at wd 2.0 + wd 3.0/4.0 probes = 26 jobs (launched ~07:57)

verdicts: SCALE-INVARIANT TIE: NS fidelity beyond 6 iters buys nothing for generalization dynamics at any tested scale. wd is the dominant knob (0.1->3.0 = 5500->800 grok, 7x). Bigger model + more data both grok FASTER (d512 f55 = 600).
dispatch: LM FINALE (user pipeline: synthetic winners -> LM at 100-120M tok): default vs ns8 vs normuon at 3700 steps (121M tok) on frozen v2 config
